2603.26064.title: MuDD: A Multimodal Deception Detection Dataset and GSR-Guided Progressive Distillation for Non-Contact Deception Detection
2603.26064.paper_summary: Non-contact automatic deception detection remains challenging because visual and auditory deception cues often lack stable cross-subject patterns. In contrast, galvanic skin response (GSR) provides more reliable physiological cues and has been widely used in contact-based deception detection. In this work, we leverage stable deception-related knowledge in GSR to guide representation learning in non-contact modalities through cross-modal knowledge distillation. A key obstacle, however, is the lack of a suitable dataset for this setting. To address this, we introduce MuDD, a large-scale Multimodal Deception Detection dataset containing recordings from 130 participants over 690 minutes. In addition to video, audio, and GSR, MuDD also provides Photoplethysmography, heart rate, and personality traits, supporting broader scientific studies of deception. Based on this dataset, we propose GSR-guided Progressive Distillation (GPD), a cross-modal distillation framework for mitigating the negative transfer caused by the large modality mismatch between GSR and non-contact signals. The core innovation of GPD is the integration of progressive feature-level and digit-level distillation with dynamic routing, which allows the model to adaptively determine how teacher knowledge should be transferred during training, leading to more stable cross-modal knowledge transfer. Extensive experiments and visualizations show that GPD outperforms existing methods and achieves state-of-the-art performance on both deception detection and concealed-digit identification.
2603.26064.paper_summary_zh: 非接觸式自動欺騙檢測仍然具有挑戰性，因為視覺和聽覺的欺騙線索往往缺乏穩定的跨受試者模式。相對而言，皮膚電反應（GSR）提供了更可靠的生理線索，並已廣泛應用於基於接觸的欺騙檢測。在這項工作中，我們利用GSR中穩定的欺騙相關知識，通過跨模態知識蒸餾來指導非接觸模態的表示學習。然而，一個主要障礙是缺乏適合這種設置的數據集。為了解決這個問題，我們介紹了MuDD，一個大規模的多模態欺騙檢測數據集，包含來自130名參與者的690分鐘錄音。除了視頻、音頻和GSR，MuDD還提供光學心率計、心率和個性特徵，支持對欺騙的更廣泛科學研究。基於這個數據集，我們提出了GSR引導的漸進式蒸餾（GPD），這是一個跨模態蒸餾框架，用於減輕GSR與非接觸信號之間的大模態不匹配所造成的負轉移。GPD的核心創新在於將漸進式特徵級和數字級蒸餾與動態路由相結合，這使得模型能夠自適應地確定在訓練過程中應如何轉移教師知識，從而實現更穩定的跨模態知識轉移。大量實驗和可視化結果表明，GPD超越了現有方法，並在欺騙檢測和隱藏數字識別方面達到了最先進的性能。
2603.26064.author: Peiyuan Jiang et.al.
2603.26064.authors: Peiyuan Jiang, Yao Liu, Yanglei Gan, Jiaye Yang, Lu Liu, Daibing Yao, Qiao Liu
